import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { seasonService, pondService } from '../../services/api'; import '../../styles/dashboard.css'; export const StaffDashboard = () => { const [assignedPonds, setAssignedPonds] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [error, setError] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { fetchData(); }, []); const fetchData = async () => { try { setLoading(true); const [pondsRes] = await Promise.all([ pondService.getAllPonds(), seasonService.getAllSeasons(), ]); // In a real app, we would filter ponds by assigned_staff = current user setAssignedPonds(pondsRes.data || []); } catch (err) { setError('Lỗi tải dữ liệu'); console.error(err); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; if (loading) { return (
); } return (
